creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Quvi have been deprecated upstream, https://github.com/guendto/quvi

Please remove all related ports

multimedia/libquvi
multimedia/libquvi-scripts
multimedia/libquvi-scripts09
multimedia/libquvi09
multimedia/quvi09

www/yt-dlp and multimedia/streamlink should replace most functionality if not all as far as I can tell
